---
title: "Chansu Han, Ph.D."
subtitle: "Curriculum Vitae"
author: ""
date: today
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    papersize: a4
    fontsize: 10pt
    geometry:
      - margin=1.8cm
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    colorlinks: true
    linkcolor: blue
    urlcolor: blue
    pdf-engine: xelatex
    mainfont: "Helvetica"
    CJKmainfont: "Hiragino Sans"
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{enumitem}
        \setlist{nosep,leftmargin=*}
        \usepackage{titlesec}
        \titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{1.2em}{0.4em}
        \titlespacing*{\subsection}{0pt}{0.9em}{0.3em}
        \usepackage{fancyhdr}
        \pagestyle{fancy}
        \fancyhf{}
        \fancyfoot[C]{\thepage}
        \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
---

**Researcher**, CREATE / Cybersecurity Laboratory, NICT, Japan · Visiting Assistant Professor, Kyushu University

**Email:** han (at) nict.go.jp ·
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ZvvIWZ4AAAAJ&hl=en) ·
[ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1728-5300) ·
[dblp](https://dblp.org/pid/186/6829.html)

{{< include _content.qmd >}}
